creator.name: Sukarna Jana
creator.handle: A robotics bee who keeps buzzing
creator.tagline: I keep experimenting, in the hope that one of them clicks for humanity.
creator.note: Every rupee goes into parts, boards, hosting and hardware. Nothing else.
creator.promise: Every rupee you send is seed money. It buys the part, the board or the hour of bench time that turns an idea into something working. If one of these ever grows into something that matters, I will know exactly who paid for the first version of it, and I will say so.

projects.title: CHHAVI, robotic bird
projects.description: A flapping wing ornithopter with onboard AI for long endurance flight. It is built to pass for a bird in the sky while it maps the terrain below, so autonomous drones have something to navigate by.
projects.goal_for: Airframe, servos, flight controller and wind tunnel time
projects.image_alt: Placeholder image for the CHHAVI robotic bird

projects.title: SWARM VTOL
projects.description: A vertical take off aircraft that holds its heading by visual compass alone, so it keeps flying where GPS is jammed or absent. Hardening it against microwave attack is part of the same problem.
projects.goal_for: Vision stack, shielded electronics and flight testing
projects.image_alt: Placeholder image for the SWARM VTOL aircraft

projects.title: FPV autonomous drone
projects.description: A first person view drone that can fly a route on its own once the pilot lets go of the sticks.
projects.goal_for: Frames, motors, cameras and a first build run
projects.image_alt: Placeholder image for the FPV autonomous drone
